reviews.review_msg: Cory is such a dilligent professor and you can see it in her way of teaching and her moddle page. To do well in the course, just do all of the homework, it may look a lot but you can get it done if you just do like 5 question each day after the class which would take like 30 min - 1 hours it is all necessary since Cory hand picked these question.
The worst math 152 teacher in fic/sfu. You have to buy her book (if you dont print) and also buy the calculus 9 book. And her quiz has 2 different "code" and usually one is harder than the other.
I really wish I could met her earlier ^^ she's so good. You can always see the smile on her face.

Cory is kind and caring. Her tests are hard so I suggest you all study well. Also, do the homework as they may be useful for quizzes. You have to understand the materials deeply to get good scores in her class. Overall, she is a great mathematics teacher. I recommend her!

For the online classes she uploads videos with really good explanations. She gives a lot of homework everyday and it is crucial for u to complete them as they hold a lot of marks. She is very understanding and will give you and extension whenever you need it. I loved taking her class.

If you know your Math is not as good as the others, don't enroll in her class, because it's curved. If u got an iPad then no need to buy the material she made, she will post the pdf version. Practice the question from textbook is extremely important

I would say that she teaches in a way that is motivational for students. For example, she gives out bonus marks for those who would like to do her questions in the board. Also, I feel like she tries to interact with everyone by remembering our names and teach in a funny manner. If you study the way she teaches you, you will understand this course.

She is really good at explaining things clearly and I would always recommend taking her courses. She is really caring and will always help those in need. She takes a lot of surprise quizzes but if you follow her lectures and practice the homework questions, you should be fine.

She is tough grader compared to instructor I took MATH151 with. But overall, if you write enough conditions for equations, do correctly, you, of course, will get full mark. Because she explains everything in detail, she lets students go home late. You would feel tired and bored at the end but it is good for students who know nothing about MATH 152

She is a good professor. besides, her midterms papers are so easy. Thats why the level of difficulty becomes very higher when it comes to final exam. Because we are not even tested by such hard paper in the class ! I felt everything is fine except her testing question in the class! She should make testing questions way harder than it is now!

Amazing lectures, with specific notes. Clearly expresses what is required and not required for this course. Considering how tough calculus 2 is, she made it seem like clockwork. Definitely would recommend.

Cory explains the material well and her midterms are very closely based on the materials discussed in class so it is always a good idea to go the class and understand those specific concepts to make life easier. Overall she is a good professor.

She's a really dedicated teacher. She makes the Calculus become much more easier for her students. She also provides wide knowledge and fair exams. Trust me if you are hard - working, MATH 157 with Cory will not be anymore difficult!

Took both Cal I and Cal II with her. Definitely a great prof. She is extremely caring and her lectures are very clear. She will take you through step by step with each topics. If you are going to take Cal I & Cal II, I strongly recommend to take it with her.

Cannot express how important it is for you to chose Cory. I took calc 1 & 2 with her and I have never seen a better instructor than she is. She grades fair and exams are not that hard just make sure to solve and practice as much as you can otherwise you are gonna have a hard time understanding calculus especially calculus 2
grading on rank of student
She's very Good teacher. She's best for MATH 152 at FIC.

Cory has done what she should do. Math152 is a magical course somehow. Doing all her homework(a lot!) and you will be fine trust me. Be sure to do enough exercise and you will find that this course is really easy. Lots of classmates fail this course just because of laziness. Integral is a concept which is highly relied on practice and imagination.
Her lecture can not be clear more. Exams are fair. Doing all the homework and you will be fine. BTW she is beautiful. Her teaching style makes 152 easier.
She is beautiful. Glad to listen to her.
She was the best math teacher I had till date. Her way of explaining math is very simple and easy to understand. She makes you work for your grades.
Nice teacher, but the course was really super hard and she does not make it less harder.

Cory Ahn is a really good instructor. Her lectures are clear and her lecture notes are all you need. You only need the textbook to do practice questions. She is also really helpful if you have any questions.
I lost my interest on Maths.  Test Heavy.
Explains everything well. Her notes are great
Good person and teacher
Great teacher
The quote I will remember Cory, my math teacher, by for years to come: "Its not my fault my work was wrong! I'm not very good at math!" Brilliant.
